creator: liangtai.s4@gmail.com
text:
QMMP upstream has released the latest version 0.5.4.

Here's an additional patch for upgrading QMMP to version 0.5.4
 http://www.geocities.jp/ss2pxd1c/qmmp053054.diff.bz2
(sorry, it isn't generated by CVS) to be used after applying your nice patc=
h
> http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/qmmp-ffmpeg.diff
toword the version 0.5.3 with some modification on the recent revision.

Beside of this, I made a shortcut patch to upgrade QMMP from the current
ports tree version 0.5.2_3 to the latest version 0.5.4.
 http://www.geocities.jp/ss2pxd1c/qmmp052054.diff.bz2
